en: "At this also my heart trembles and leaps out of its place.
zh: “我的心因此戰兢， 跳離原處。

en: Keep listening to the thunder of his voice and the rumbling that comes from his mouth.
zh: 你們當細聽他轟轟的聲音， 他口中發出隆隆的雷聲。

en: Under the whole heaven he lets it go, and his lightning to the corners of the earth.
zh: 他發雷聲響遍天下， 也發電光閃到地極。

en: After it his voice roars; he thunders with his majestic voice, and he does not restrain the lightnings when his voice is heard.
zh: 接著雷聲霹靂， 神以自己威嚴之聲打雷， 人聽到雷聲的時候， 神並沒有留住風霜雨雲 。

en: God thunders wondrously with his voice; he does great things that we cannot comprehend.
zh: 神以奇妙的方法打雷， 他行大事，我們不能了解。

en: For to the snow he says, 'Fall on the earth,' likewise to the downpour, his mighty downpour.
zh: 他對雪說：‘降在地上’， 對大雨暴雨也是這樣。

en: He seals up the hand of every man, that all men whom he made may know it.
zh: 他封住各人的手， 叫萬人知道他的作為。

en: Then the beasts go into their lairs, and remain in their dens.
zh: 野獸進入洞中， 留在穴裡。

en: From its chamber comes the whirlwind, and cold from the scattering winds.
zh: 風暴來自南宮， 寒冷出於北方。

en: By the breath of God ice is given, and the broad waters are frozen fast.
zh: 神所呼的氣息結成冰， 廣闊無邊的水也凝結；

en: He loads the thick cloud with moisture; the clouds scatter his lightning.
zh: 他使密雲滿載水氣， 雲彩布散他的電光。

en: They turn around and around by his guidance, to accomplish all that he commands them on the face of the habitable world.
zh: 電光照著 神的指引來往旋轉， 在地球上行他一切所吩咐的。

en: Whether for correction or for his land or for love, he causes it to happen.
zh: 他使電光來臨，是為施行責罰， 或為滋潤大地，或為賜予慈愛。

en: "Hear this, O Job; stop and consider the wondrous works of God.
zh: 約伯啊！你當留心聽這話， 要站立思想 神奇妙的事。

en: Do you know how God lays his command upon them and causes the lightning of his cloud to shine?
zh: 神怎樣吩咐這些， 又怎樣使雲中的電光照耀，你知道嗎？

en: Do you know the balancings of the clouds, the wondrous works of him who is perfect in knowledge,
zh: 密雲怎樣浮於空中， 那知識全備者奇妙的作為，你知道嗎？

en: you whose garments are hot when the earth is still because of the south wind?
zh: 地因南風而寂靜的時候， 你的衣服怎樣熱起來，你知道嗎？

en: Can you, like him, spread out the skies, hard as a cast metal mirror?
zh: 你能與 神同鋪雲天嗎？ 這雲天堅硬如鑄成的鏡子。

en: Teach us what we shall say to him; we cannot draw up our case because of darkness.
zh: 我們因愚昧無知的緣故，不能陳明我們的案件， 請你告訴我們應該對他說甚麼話。

en: Shall it be told him that I would speak? Did a man ever wish that he would be swallowed up?
zh: 人怎能對他說：‘我要說話’？ 哪有人自願滅亡呢？

en: "And now no one looks on the light when it is bright in the skies, when the wind has passed and cleared them.
zh: 人不能看見雲後的強光， 唯有經風一吹，天才晴朗。

en: Out of the north comes golden splendor; God is clothed with awesome majesty.
zh: 金光來自北方， 在 神的周圍有可怕的威嚴。

en: The Almighty- we cannot find him; he is great in power; justice and abundant righteousness he will not violate.
zh: 論到全能者，我們無法把他查出； 他大有能力與公平， 又滿有公義，他必不苦待人。

en: Therefore men fear him; he does not regard any who are wise in their own conceit."
zh: 因此人人都應該敬畏他； 心中自以為有智慧的， 他都不看顧。”
